testcase.name: SignupWithDataBase
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"link text","selector":"Login or register"} (Session info: testcase.name: Login
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.StaleElementReferenceException: stale element reference: stale element not found (Session info: MicrosoftEdge=145.0.3800.58) For documentation on this error,
